- Why now?

- Acceptance criteria:

## Tests (Test-first)

- [ ] Added regression test (or explained why not needed)
- [ ] Ran `make ci-fast`

# paste key outputs (pytest/ruff etc.)

## Docs (Docs-as-code)

- [ ] Ran `make check-docs`
- [ ] Included user/operator impact notes

Docs evidence:
- Updated files:
- Reason for each update:

- Risk:
- Rollback plan:

## Pre-merge checklist
- [ ] `make ci-strict` passed locally (or in CI)
- [ ] Template governance checks passed (`check-template`, `check-locks`)
